errors.keyPattern: Use letters, digits, and underscores only (must start with a letter)

suggest.title: ✨ AI suggests parameters

suggest.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. parameterize the URL too / treat secrets as secret type
suggest.empty: Nothing to suggest (already well-defined or no hard-coded values).
